text: I just love sitting in traffic for two hours on my way to work. Best part of my day!
A fire station burned down today. The firefighters were out responding to a call at the time.
Had an amazing dinner with friends last night at the new Italian place. Highly recommend the pasta!
Oh wonderful, my flight got cancelled. Thank you so much for ruining my vacation, airline!
The plumber's house has been flooding for weeks because he's too busy fixing everyone else's pipes.
Just finished reading a great book. Can't wait to start the sequel this weekend.
Sure, go ahead and eat my lunch from the office fridge. It's not like I was looking forward to it or anything.
A grammar textbook was recalled today due to numerous spelling errors throughout the publication.
What a beautiful day to stay inside and do homework all afternoon. Living the dream!
The weather forecast says sunny all week. Finally some good news to brighten up the spring.
